system.description:
When you take the lead in a Chase segment, say how you overcome the immediate obstacle and roll with the fitting attribute.

  • Nerve: sprint, leap, drive, dodge, or react fast.
  • Brains: outthink, navigate, predict, or improvise a route.
  • Charm: bluff, command, distract, or intimidate.
  • Tough: smash through, shove aside, or fight your way through.

failure.value: Fill in 1 Chase Clock segment, and the Lead chooses to either lose 1 Ground, or remain neutral but put a Hero of the Lead's choice In Jeopardy!

partial.value: Fill in 1 Chase Clock segment, and the Lead chooses to either remain neutral, or gain 1 Ground and put a Hero of the Lead's choice In Jeopardy!

success.value: Fill in 1 Chase Clock segment and gain 1 Ground.

critical.value: Fill in 1 Chase Clock segment and gain 1 Ground, plus the Lead gains an Edge.
